description: The ProtoFluxOperationProxy component is used to allow plugging impulse wires into protoflux visuals.

fields.Node: The protoflux node this is pointing to.
fields.ElementName: The name of the input this is targeting.
fields.IsDynamic: Whether or not this is dynamic.
fields.Index: The index from top to bottom of the node's inputs.
fields.ConnectPoint: The point the wire should connect to.
fields.NodeOperation: The node operation target (impulse target) this is a connector for.
fields.IsAsync: Whether the impulse input type is async.
